programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: My Christmas Prince
programme.desc: A teacher returns to her home town, where she is joined by her boyfriend and learns that he is the crown prince of Madelvia.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking
programme.desc: After the death of her stalker, a new mother pieces her life back together with the help of her new personal assistant.

programme.title: Oscar Pistorius: Blade Runner Killer
programme.desc: The true story of the sprint runner and his rise to fame as a Paralympian gold medallist. It all shattered one evening when four bullets were fired and his beautiful girlfriend's life was taken.

programme.title: Ann Rule's A Murder To Remember
programme.desc: Javier and Robin Rivera are celebrating their one-year anniversary on a camping trip. But when Javier ends up dead, Robin finds herself alone in the rough wilderness.

programme.title: Zoe Gone
programme.desc: Sixteen-year-old Jennifer is already struggling with single motherhood when the kidnapping of her daughter, Zoe, kicks her maternal instincts into overdrive.

programme.title: Her Affair to Die For
programme.desc: A young woman's dad becomes the obsession of her seductive roommate, who will stop at nothing to possess him.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Hidden Jewel
programme.desc: Ruby struggles to find a happy life with Beau Andreas, the true father of Pearl, and to protect their daughter. Sheltered from sorrow, Pearl thrives in the sunshine of a loving home.

programme.title: Vanished in Yosemite
programme.desc: While on vacation in Yosemite, sisters Katrina and Jennifer meet the perfect guy Rick. Katrina is certain she has met Mr Right, however, when Katrina goes missing, Jennifer suspects kidnapping.

programme.title: Journey's End
programme.desc: March, 1918. C-company arrives to take its turn in the front-line trenches in northern France, led by the war-weary Captain Stanhope.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew work under fire to make a film to lift the nation's spirits, and inspire America to join the war.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: The true story of the King of Bechuanaland, and the London office worker he married despite fierce opposition from the British and South African governments.

programme.title: Colette
programme.desc: Set at the dawn of the modern age, this is the story of a woman who has been long denied her voice going to extraordinary lengths to reclaim it.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: Professor Phillip Goodman is a renowned sceptic of all things supernatural who is given the opportunity to investigate three cases of baffling paranormal activity.

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: This drama chronicles four seasons in the lives of a happy couple and their relationships with family and friends.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: Absolutely Anything
programme.desc: A group of aliens bestow upon a random Earthling the ability to make absolutely anything happen, to see if he uses the power for good or for evil.

programme.title: Le Week-End
programme.desc: A long-married couple revisit Paris for a long weekend for the first time since their honeymoon, in hopes of rekindling their relationship - or, perhaps, to bring it to an end.

programme.title: A United Kingdom
programme.desc: The true story of the King of Bechuanaland, and the London office worker he married despite fierce opposition from the British and South African governments.

programme.desc: Set at the dawn of the modern age, this is the story of a woman who has been long denied her voice going to extraordinary lengths to reclaim it.

programme.title: Ghost Stories
programme.desc: Professor Phillip Goodman is a renowned sceptic of all things supernatural who is given the opportunity to investigate three cases of baffling paranormal activity.

programme.title: Fish Tank
programme.desc: A troubled, volatile 15-year-old girl's mum brings a mysterious stranger into their home. It promises to change everything, but life isn't always that simple.

programme.title: Slumdog Millionaire
programme.desc: A young orphan from the slums of Mumbai, who is one question away from the Who Wants To Be A Millionaire jackpot, is arrested on suspicion of cheating.

programme.desc: As life on Earth grinds to a halt, a team of explorers and astronauts travel through a wormhole and across the galaxy to discover whether mankind has a future among the stars.

programme.desc: The story revolves around UN employee Gerry Lane, who travels the world in a race against time to stop a pandemic that is toppling armies and governments and threatening to decimate humanity itself.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law Of Return
programme.desc: A squad of elite soldiers, risk their own lives in the hopes of saving an ally they've never met, when he's shot down flying through Syrian airspace.

programme.title: Wrath of Man
programme.desc: A new security guard for a cash truck company surprises his co-workers when he unleashes precision skills during a heist. The crew is left wondering who is he and where has he come from?

programme.title: Bad Boys For Life
programme.desc: The original Bad Boys are back! After a string of assassinations and an attempt on Mike's life, he convinces a hesitant Marcus to hold off retirement and partner one last time.

programme.title: Venom
programme.desc: When Eddie Brock acquires the powers of a Symbiote, he will have to release his alter-ego 'Venom' to save his life.

programme.title: The Great Wall
programme.desc: A group of European mercenaries become embroiled in the defense of the Great Wall of China in this epic adventure.

programme.title: Geostorm
programme.desc: A system of satellites designed to protect the earth from natural disasters starts to malfunction, but who is responsible and can it be stopped?

programme.title: Angels & Demons
programme.desc: When Langdon discovers evidence of the resurgence of an ancient secret brotherhood, he also faces a deadly threat to the existence of the organisation's most despised enemy: the Catholic Church.

programme.title: The Shallows
programme.desc: When a surfer is attacked by a great white shark 20 yards from shore, her short journey back to safety becomes the ultimate contest of wills.

programme.title: Jarhead: Law Of Return
programme.desc: A squad of elite soldiers, risk their own lives in the hopes of saving an ally they've never met, when he's shot down flying through Syrian airspace.

programme.title: The Italian Job
programme.desc: The plan was flawless. The execution was perfect. Charlie Croker pulled off the crime of a lifetime.

programme.title: Machete
programme.desc: Left for dead after clashing with notorious Mexican drug kingpin Torrez, Machete escapes to Texas, looking to disappear and forget his tragic past. What he finds is a web of corruption and deceit.

programme.title: The Other Guys
programme.desc: Stumbling onto what could be one of the biggest crimes in years, can misfit NYPD detectives step up their game to solve the case without killing each other and destroying NYC in the process?

programme.title: Ghostbusters
programme.desc: Armed with proton packs and a new range of kick-ass weapons, the Ghostbusters battle to save the city from an uprising of mischievous ghouls.

programme.title: The Nutty Professor II: The Klumps
programme.desc: Sherman Klump's getting married but his alter-ego, Buddy Love, is a problem. He steals Sherman's fountain of youth formula and tangles with the whole Klump family.

programme.title: Mr. Bean's Holiday
programme.desc: Mr Bean can't believe his luck when he wins a camcorder and an all-expense paid holiday to the French Riviera. But during his journey to the south, he falls face first into a series of mishaps.

programme.title: Police Academy
programme.desc: As a crime wave sweeps the city and the police department suffers a shortage of officers, the mayor decrees that admission to the police academy will be open to any and all applicants.

programme.title: Land of the Lost
programme.desc: A has-been scientist with no weapons, no skills and no idea at all, lands in an alternative universe of marauding dinosaurs and fantastic creatures.

programme.title: Freq Asked Questions About Time Travel
programme.desc: In this funny take on the sci-fi genre, three guys in boring jobs accidentally stumble through a time leak into the future of their local bar, where they try to avoid earlier versions of themselves.

programme.title: Scary Movie
programme.desc: In this send-up of the most popular horror movies, a familiar-looking group of teenagers find themselves being stalked by a more-than-vaguely recognisable masked killer.

programme.title: Ghostbusters

programme.title: American Pie: The Wedding
programme.desc: Stifler takes centre stage in the funniest - and grossest - sequel. Jim finally proposes to Michelle, but nothing goes smoothly in this finale which will keep die-hard Pie eaters coming back.

programme.title: Hot Rod
programme.desc: This hilarious comedy is about an amateur stuntman who has to stage the stunt of his life to pay for his mean stepdad's operation. The stunt: to jump 15 buses!

programme.title: Johnny English Strikes Again
programme.desc: After a cyber-attack reveals the identity of all of the active undercover agents in Britain, Johnny English is forced to come out of retirement to find the mastermind hacker.

programme.title: Memoirs of a Geisha
programme.desc: A stunning adaptation of Arthur Golden's bestselling novel set in an exotic world tells the story of a servant who blossoms against all odds to become the most enchanting geisha of her day.

programme.title: The Break-Up
programme.desc: After two years together, Gary and Brooke's relationship seems to have taken a comical wrong turn on the way to happily ever after.

programme.title: Kate & Leopold
programme.desc: Romance ignites when a rip in time entwines a 19th century bachelor and a 21st century woman. The star-crossed lovers discover that passion and chivalry never go out of style.

programme.title: Sleepless in Seattle
programme.desc: After a man pours out his love for his late wife on radio, a listener inexplicably decides that he is her destiny and treks across the USA to meet him.

programme.title: You've Got Mail
programme.desc: Two anonymous emailers fall head-over-laptops in love, unaware they are fierce rivals in the bookshop business.

programme.desc: In turn-of-the-century New Orleans, a wealthy merchant enacts a fatal plan to break the Italians' control of the docks.

programme.desc: A magical sword, a notorious assassin, a nobleman's daughter, a breathtaking quest: it adds up to the top foreign language film of all time.

programme.title: Bram Stoker's Dracula
programme.desc: Dracula, the vampire doomed as a creature of the night after forsaking God, is aroused by the image of a woman resembling his lost love.

programme.title: Mad Max 2: The Road Warrior
programme.desc: Max drives the roads of outback Australia in an unending search for gasoline. Arrayed against him and the other defenders of a fuel depot are the bizarre warriors commanded by the Humungus.

programme.title: Casino
programme.desc: Greed, deception, money and murder envelop two mobsters and a devious trophy wife running a Las Vegas casino.

programme.title: Lawrence of Arabia
programme.desc: When TE Lawrence is attached to the British general staff in Arabia, he inspires the feuding Arabian chieftains to rebel against the Turks, leading to the birth of the Arabian kingdom.

programme.desc: Fact-based story of a Louisiana priest accused of molesting young parishioners, and of the family of one of his victims, caught between their loyalty to their son and to their church.

programme.title: Death Becomes Her
programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Vanished in Yosemite
programme.desc: While on vacation in Yosemite, sisters Katrina and Jennifer meet the perfect guy Rick. Katrina is certain she has met Mr Right, however, when Katrina goes missing, Jennifer suspects kidnapping.

programme.title: Her Deadly Night In Paris
programme.desc: An American exchange student in Paris falls in love with her host family's handsome son, but when she witnesses a murder, the couple must go on the run to prove her innocence.

programme.title: Killer Fortune Teller
programme.desc: Shane Settel starts to believe in fate after a chance tarot reading. He has the largest success in his professional career and falls in love, but then tragedies begin to follow him.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Circle Of Deception
programme.desc: A small island community is turned upside down when one of the town's citizens, Russel Douglas, is found dead the day after Christmas.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing after her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents soon find some unexpected help as they embark on a desperate search to find her.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Heaven
programme.desc: Of all the poor people living in 'the willies', the foothills of the mountains of West Virginia, the Casteels were considered lowest.

programme.title: Ann Rule's Sleeping With Danger
programme.desc: Paul Carter was like a knight in shining armour when he met flight attendant Grace Tanner and swept her into a passionate love affair. But her dream man quickly became her nightmare.

programme.title: Framed by My Husband
programme.desc: When June's wealthy husband Rick becomes the target of an extortionist who claims he sexually assaulted her, Rick convinces his wife it's an act of revenge.

programme.title: It's Beginning to Look a Lot Like Murder
programme.desc: In the middle of preparing for her business' biggest season, Diana Hart learns she inherited an old house from her beloved aunt who was murdered.

programme.title: Nightmare Tenant
programme.desc: A single mum takes her daughter's advice and lets out her spare room to a student in need. But the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Husband, Wife and Their Lover
programme.desc: A sexually charged thriller about Franklin and Bridget, a married couple in trouble.

programme.title: Burned By Love
programme.desc: A divorcee meets her seemingly perfect match on an online dating site, only to discover he's a scammer who's looking to destroy her life.

programme.title: The Lover in the Attic: A True Story
programme.desc: This is the lurid, true story about femme fatale Dolly, her murdered husband, and her lover, Otto - the man in the attic.

programme.title: The Paramedic Who Stalked Me
programme.desc: After a deadly accident, a young woman becomes the target of an obsessed EMT worker who saved her life.

programme.title: Abducted on Prom Night
programme.desc: Against her better judgement, a mother allows her troubled daughter to attend prom, but the night turns into a twisted game of cat-and-mouse as the daughter and her friends are taken hostage.

programme.title: Waking Up To Danger
programme.desc: A young mother picks up the pieces after a horrible accident damages her memory. She soon suspects her husband's indiscretions are what caused her suffering and that her family is in danger.

programme.title: Taken in Montana
programme.desc: When her parents go missing during a family vacation, a teen tries to put the clues together to find them, but she may be trusting the wrong people for help.

programme.title: Slumdog Millionaire
programme.desc: A young orphan from the slums of Mumbai, who is one question away from the Who Wants To Be A Millionaire jackpot, is arrested on suspicion of cheating.

programme.title: Route Irish
programme.desc: A security contractor in Iraq rejects the official explanation of his friend's death and decides to investigate.

programme.title: Swimming with Men
programme.desc: Eric joins an all-male group of synchronised swimmers, discovering that making patterns in a pool can, for a couple of hours at least, smooth out the bumps in his life.

programme.title: 44 Inch Chest
programme.desc: A man is shattered by his wife's infidelity. When his friends urge him to exact retribution, he wrestles with remorse, grief and self pity.

programme.title: A Guide To Second Date Sex
programme.desc: Laura and Ryan have been totally destroyed by previous relationships. In the hope of getting it right, they go on a second date having no idea what they're supposed to do.

programme.title: McKellen: Playing the Part
programme.desc: Built upon a 14-hour interview, this film is a unique journey through the key landmarks of McKellen's life.

programme.title: The Iron Lady

programme.title: High-Rise
programme.desc: A doctor moves into a London skyscraper where rising tensions and class warfare lead to anarchy.

programme.title: Toast
programme.desc: Bittersweet story of a food writer's road to adulthood via his association with culinary tastes and smells. A delicious love letter to set to the songs of Dusty Springfield.

programme.desc: A beautiful young widow visits her in-laws' estate while waiting for social chatter about her personal indiscretions to pass.

programme.desc: Two Hollywood divas' surgery-enhanced rivalry goes beyond the grave.

programme.title: Wayne's World
programme.desc: Wayne and Garth host the biggest show on local public access TV. Now a sleazy network executive wants to produce a big-budget version. With the help of Wayne's girlfriend, they must battle to save the show.

programme.title: Grumpy Old Men
programme.desc: When a lonely, flamboyant, middle-aged widow moves in across the street from them, the male rivalry between two neighbours begins.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II
programme.desc: The hard-nosed Detroit cop returns to Los Angeles to solve another case. This time, he must direct his efforts towards unravelling the Alphabet Crimes, a series of robberies committed by punks.

programme.title: Back To The Future II
programme.desc: Marty McFly returns, this time travelling forward to 2015 with wacky Doc Brown to save his kids. Their crazy time-travels have a mind-bending effect on history.

programme.title: Willy Wonka & the Chocolate Factory
programme.desc: Touring an incredible, edible realm of chocolate waterfalls, Oompa-Loompas and industrial-sized confections, a boy named Charlie will discover the sweetest secret of all: a generous, loving heart.

programme.title: Every Which Way But Loose
programme.desc: Philo Beddoe likes beer, brawling and country music. When he falls for a sexy singer, he sets out to win her with Clyde his orangutan in tow.

programme.title: Almost Famous
programme.desc: A coming-of-age story about an aspiring teenage writer who, ignoring the advice of his mother, goes on the road with an almost famous band in the '70s.

programme.title: Taken in Montana
programme.desc: When her parents go missing during a family vacation, a teen tries to put the clues together to find them, but she may be trusting the wrong people for help.

programme.title: You Can't Escape Me
programme.desc: An aspiring artist is finally done with her abusive husband. She knows she must start over. She thinks she is safe in Portland with a friend, but she finds herself in danger.

programme.title: Mommy Meanest
programme.desc: A teenage girl is relentlessly cyber-bullied, only to find out the horrific texts are from her own mother.

programme.title: Nightmare in the Desert
programme.desc: After returning to her childhood home, someone secretly tracks an outdoor enthusiast and her urbanite boyfriend through the desert.

programme.title: Kidnapping in the Grand Canyon
programme.desc: Two best friends hiking the Grand Canyon trust a hiking guide to take them on an off trail adventure.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Dark Angel
programme.desc: In her grandmother's fine, rich, Boston house, Heaven Casteel dreams of a wonderful new life of new friends, the best schools, clothes, and love.

programme.title: Lust: A Seven Deadly Sins Story
programme.desc: Tiffanie is about to have the wedding of her dreams to her soul mate Damon. But when Damon's old friend Trey arrives, fresh from prison, to be Damon's best man, Tiffanie's whole world is rocked.

programme.title: Seeds of Yesterday
programme.desc: The saga of the tormented Dollangangers comes to an end where the family continues to coexist miserably.

programme.title: Petals on the Wind
programme.desc: A decade after Cathy, Christopher, and Carrie escaped from their grandparents' attic, the family attempt to put their past behind them, but soon discover certain secrets can't be left behind.

programme.title: The Beach House Murders
programme.desc: A lonely female novelist becomes a prime suspect in a homicide after a one-night tryst with a mysterious stranger who turns up dead at her summer home.

programme.title: My Nightmare Office Affair
programme.desc: Nick is a successful executive with a picture-perfect family, loving wife and adorable daughter. His boss Lisa seduces Nick in his moment of weakness, hoping to remove his wife from the picture.

programme.title: Happy Face Killer
programme.desc: Grisly serial killer Keith Hunter Jesperson taunts authorities with scribbled confessions bearing a smiley face at the scenes of his crimes. Based on a true story.

programme.title: Who Killed JonBenet?
programme.desc: Revisit the infamous murder of pint-sized beauty queen JonBenet Ramsey and the lurid details that captivated a nation.

programme.title: Stalked by a Prince
programme.desc: Publicist Alyssa thinks she's in a fairytale when she meets a British prince who whisks her away to Europe. Alyssa's dream turns into a nightmare when the prince refuses to let her leave.

programme.title: To Have and to Hold
programme.desc: Alice, who still can't believe her high school crush, the dashing, wealthy, and successful Joe, would choose to marry her, willingly allows him to mould her into his ideal socialite wife.

programme.title: Hunt for the Labyrinth Killer
programme.desc: An ace ADA works with a driven cop to catch Daedalus, a serial killer infamous for luring his victims to their deaths with elaborate traps.

programme.title: The Lost Wife of Robert Durst
programme.desc: Young and wide-eyed Kathie falls in love with the charming Robert Durst, only to find their marriage turning stranger and darker as time passes.

programme.title: The Pregnancy Scheme
programme.desc: Pregnant and newly single, Julia faces a looming catastrophe when she loses her job. An unlikely lifeline arrives in the form of her new friend Alana.

programme.title: Felicia's Journey
programme.desc: A lovesick young woman searches for the father of her unborn child in seedy Birmingham and becomes involved with a mysterious catering manager.

programme.title: Macbeth
programme.desc: After murdering the King of Scotland and taking the throne, Macbeth begins to unravel as he becomes consumed with paranoia and guilt.

programme.title: Calvary
programme.desc: In this compelling drama, a compassionate priest and estranged father confronts his own demons as he senses the menacing forces of his scornful parish closing in around him.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Action. Paul Giamatti, James Purefoy, Kate Mara and Brian Cox star in this rollicking Robin Hood-style adventure.

programme.title: Queen of the Desert
programme.desc: A chronicle of Gertrude Bell's life, a traveller, writer, archaeologist, explorer, cartographer, and political attache for the British Empire at the dawn of the twentieth century.

programme.title: A Little Chaos
programme.desc: This period drama tells the tale of two landscape artists who become romantically involved while constructing the grand gardens at King Louis XIV's palace at Versailles.

programme.title: The Best Offer
programme.desc: A master auctioneer becomes obsessed with an extremely reclusive heiress and collector of fine art, who he has never actually met.

programme.title: Testament of Youth
programme.desc: Based on the World War I memoir by Vera Brittain, the tale of one woman's searing journey from youthful hopes and dreams to the edge of despair and back again.

programme.title: Calvary
programme.desc: In this compelling drama, a compassionate priest and estranged father confronts his own demons as he senses the menacing forces of his scornful parish closing in around him.

programme.title: Ironclad
programme.desc: Action. Paul Giamatti, James Purefoy, Kate Mara and Brian Cox star in this rollicking Robin Hood-style adventure.

programme.title: Another Year
programme.desc: This drama chronicles four seasons in the lives of a happy couple and their relationships with family and friends.

programme.title: The Limehouse Golem
programme.desc: When a series of brutal murders occur in London, the community believes that a legendary dark creature must be responsible.

programme.title: Anna and the Apocalypse
programme.desc: T'was the night before Christmas, when a zombie apocalypse threatened a sleepy town. Anna and her friends must fight, slash, and sing their way to survival.

programme.title: French Girl

programme.title: Bob Marley: One Love

programme.title: Trainwreck

programme.title: The Ugly Truth
programme.desc: A hopelessly single TV producer is in for a rude awakening when a chauvinistic shock jock takes over as host of her poorly rating show.

programme.title: Crazy, Stupid, Love.

programme.title: 50 First Dates

programme.title: Blended
programme.desc: After a terrible blind date, two single parents and their kids find themselves stuck together on an African wildlife holiday where things go from bad to worse.

programme.title: Look Who's Talking Too
programme.desc: In this sequel, Mikey, a wise-cracking toddler, meets his match when an unwelcome baby sister arrives.

programme.title: Morning Glory
programme.desc: Trouble ensues when a feisty producer attempts to revive a struggling news program with feuding co-hosts.

programme.title: My Best Friend's Wedding
programme.desc: Jules realises she's in love with her best friend, who's about to marry someone else. She'll do anything to steal him away, except tell him the truth.

programme.title: Scary Movie

programme.title: Something's Gotta Give
programme.desc: Harry, 63, has a reputation for dating girls in their twenties. But a heart attack makes him grow up when he lands in the care of a mature woman.

programme.title: Pitch Perfect 3

programme.title: The Fabulous Four
programme.desc: The story of two friends who travel to be bridesmaids in a surprise wedding of their college girlfriend.

programme.title: Meet the Parents

programme.title: Summer Camp
programme.desc: Follows three friends who used to spend every summer at a sleep away camp together. After years, when the opportunity to get back together for a summer camp reunion presents itself, they all seize it.

programme.title: Sex Tape

programme.title: Harry Potter & The Half-Blood Prince

programme.title: Harry Potter & Deathly Hallows Part 1
programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione set out on their perilous mission to track down and destroy the secret to Voldemort's immortality and destruction - the Horcruxes.

programme.title: Harry Potter Deathly Hallows Part 2
programme.desc: Harry, Ron and Hermione set out on their perilous mission to track down and destroy the Horcruxes: the keys to Voldemort's immortality.

programme.title: Harry Potter & the Philosopher's Stone
programme.desc: Harry learns that he's the orphaned son of wizards, with magical powers of his own, and enrols at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry.

programme.title: Harry Potter & The Chamber Of Secrets
programme.desc: A young wizard and his friends face new challenges during their second year at Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry as they try to uncover a dark force that is terrorising the school.

programme.title: The Secret of the Sword
programme.desc: Prince Adam is sent to the world of Etheria to find his long abducted sister, Adora, and awaken her to her own destiny.

programme.title: Jumanji

programme.title: The Amazing Spider-Man
programme.desc: After Peter Parker is bitten by a genetically altered spider, he gains new-found, spider-like powers and ventures out to save the city from the machinations of a mysterious reptilian foe.

programme.desc: In 1840s England, acclaimed but overlooked fossil hunter Mary Anning and a young woman sent to convalesce by the sea develop an intense relationship, altering both of their lives forever.

programme.title: Neds
programme.desc: Encompassed by violent street gangs, neglectful parents, bullying teachers and a lack of positive role models, a studious but emotionally abandoned kid turns thug.

programme.title: Coriolanus
programme.desc: After being banished from Rome, a revered and feared Roman General allies himself with his sworn enemy to take his revenge on the city.

programme.title: The Amazing Maurice
programme.desc: This story follows Maurice, a streetwise cat, who has the perfect money-making scam. He finds a dumb-looking kid who plays a pipe and has his very own horde of rats.

programme.title: How to Talk to Girls at Parties
programme.desc: An alien touring the galaxy breaks away from her group and meets two young inhabitants of the most dangerous place in the universe: the London suburb of Croydon.

programme.title: Cheri
programme.desc: In this superb drama set in pre-World War I Paris, an ageing courtesan has an ill-fated love affair with the son of her rival.

programme.title: Their Finest
programme.desc: Catrin, an untried screenwriter, and a makeshift cast and crew work under fire to make a film to lift the nation's spirits, and inspire America to join the war.

programme.title: The Railway Man
programme.desc: The captivating, true story of a man who discovers the Japanese officer who tortured him during the war is still alive, and sets out to confront him.

programme.title: Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
programme.desc: A vibrant affair between a legendary femme fatale and her young lover quickly grows into a deep relationship. Their passion for life is tested by events beyond their control.

programme.desc: Holmes and Watson join forces to solve a murder at Buckingham Palace. They soon realise that they only have 5760 minutes to solve the case, or the Queen will be next.

programme.title: The Little Hours
programme.desc: In this unapologetically raunchy comedy set in the Middle Ages, a group of repressed nuns are tempted by a young and handsome servant who is hired as the convent's new labourer.

programme.title: Semi-Pro
programme.desc: The worst team in the renegade American Basketball Association is on the brink of collapse, but can it rebound to salvation?

programme.title: Spanglish
programme.desc: For John Clasky, life as a celebrity chef means balancing a high-profile career and raising a family. Hiring a housekeeper from Mexico, he quickly learns it may be his life that needs translation.

programme.title: Monster-In-Law
programme.desc: Charlotte finally finds the man of her dreams only to discover that his mother is the woman of her nightmares.

programme.title: Made of Honour
programme.desc: Hannah surprises Tom, her best friend who is secretly in love with her, with the news of her engagement. Things take a complicated turn when she asks Tom to be her maid of honour.

programme.title: Jerry Maguire
programme.desc: A sports agent suddenly discovers his scruples and promptly loses his job. But with the help of one loyal colleague and one outrageous client, he learns that loving well is the best revenge.

programme.title: The American President
programme.desc: When the widowed US president courts a Washington lobbyist, wild rumours decimate his approval ratings. An intelligent political-romantic comedy.

programme.title: Dave
programme.desc: A kindhearted man who works to help people find jobs is manipulated into doubling for the President of the United States after he suffers a stroke in the arms of a young woman.

programme.title: Fifty Shades Freed
programme.desc: Anastasia and Christian have settled into a life together, but lingering demons from Christian's past threaten to disrupt their happily ever after.

programme.desc: A twist of fate sends a down-and-out tennis player with a ranking of 119 off to Wimbledon for his last chance of winning the men's singles title and the heart of the star 'bad girl' of tennis.

programme.title: Baby Mama
programme.desc: Kate is a successful career woman who wants something more, a baby. But she gets more than she bargained for when she hires Angie, a free spirit, to be her surrogate in a hysterical mama match-up.

programme.title: Indictment: The McMartin Trial
programme.desc: A fact-based drama based on the longest and most expensive trial in American history that ended without a single conviction.

programme.title: Philadelphia
programme.desc: An up-and-coming young lawyer sues his former employer for wrongful termination after he suspects his dismissal from his prestigious job may have been due to his contracting AIDS.

programme.title: Split
programme.desc: Three girls are kidnapped by a man with 23 distinct personalities and they must try to escape before the next one emerges.

programme.title: Se7en
programme.desc: Two cops track a brilliant and elusive killer who orchestrates a string of horrific murders.

programme.title: Zodiac
programme.desc: Fear and paranoia grip San Francisco as a killer sends terrifying threats and cryptic codes to police and publishers.

programme.title: October Sky
programme.desc: In this true story, a young boy's future is changed by the 1957 launch of the Sputnik satellite. He becomes determined to learn all he can about rockets and decides to build his own.

programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love, and enemies, of his own.

programme.title: Operation Petticoat
programme.desc: During World War II, a commander finds himself stuck with a decrepit (and pink) submarine, a con man executive officer, and a group of army nurses.

programme.title: Kindergarten Cop
programme.desc: Follows an undercover cop whose attempt to locate a boy and his mother leads him to a kindergarten where he poses as an unlikely teacher. A classic comedy with a sharp crime edge to it.

programme.title: Twister
programme.desc: Thrill-seeking meteorologists are chasing the most destructive tornado in 50 years.

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when he is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Father Goose
programme.desc: During WWII, a man persuaded to live on an isolated island and spot aircraft finds himself responsible for a teacher and several students, all female.

programme.title: The Karate Kid: Part II
programme.desc: Daniel, now a karate champ, goes to Okinawa with Mr Miyagi, his mentor. Miyagi rekindles an old flame while Daniel finds love, and enemies, of his own.

programme.title: Twister

programme.title: Robin Hood: Prince of Thieves
programme.desc: Robin vows to avenge his father's death when he is murdered by the Sheriff of Nottingham.

programme.title: Montana
programme.desc: Ranchers and their children are divided over whether to sell their land.

programme.title: The Enforcer
programme.desc: Macho cop 'Dirty Harry' Callahan grudgingly takes on a female partner. San Francisco's mayor has been kidnapped and it's only a matter of time until the fatal showdown.

programme.title: You Can't Take My Daughter
programme.desc: Amy is a law student in Charlotte who is attacked and raped by Demetri, a friend of a friend. Discovering that she is pregnant from the rape, Amy makes a difficult decision to keep the baby.

programme.title: Man with my Husband's Face
programme.desc: When a woman's husband disappears during a kayak trip, everyone assumes that he drowned. When she catches a glimpse of a man who looks exactly like him, it sets off a chain of events.

programme.title: Blonde and Blonder
programme.desc: When two dimwitted, blonde bombshells are mistaken for the underworld's most cunning assassins, they are approached with a lucrative contract to take out the head of the Chinese mafia.

programme.title: Vanished in Death Valley
programme.desc: A teenage girl goes missing after her family's car breaks down in Death Valley. Her parents soon find some unexpected help as they embark on a desperate search to find her.

programme.title: Your Boyfriend Is Mine
programme.desc: Over the objection of his girlfriend, Ben agrees to take a job as the live-in manservant to a wealthy businesswoman, Amanda, but quickly realises he has made a deal with the devil.

programme.title: V.C. Andrews' Gates Of Paradise
programme.desc: The car crash that killed Heaven and Logan left Annie Casteel Stonewall orphaned and crippled. Whisked off to Farthinggale Manor by the possessive Tony Tatterton, Annie pines for her lost family.

programme.title: She Went Missing
programme.desc: A reporter's long-dormant stalker re-emerges when she returns to her hometown to investigative the disappearance of her childhood best friend.

programme.title: Amish Witches: Story of Holmes County
programme.desc: A reality TV crew moves into Holmes County, Ohio, to document the lives of an isolated sect of Swartzentruber Amish. Production is halted by the death of a Brauchau, an Amish witch.

programme.title: Nightmare in the Desert
programme.desc: After returning to her childhood home, someone secretly tracks an outdoor enthusiast and her urbanite boyfriend through the desert.

programme.title: Killer Vacation
programme.desc: Jake and his pregnant girlfriend, Lindsey, visit a resort, only to find his soon-to-be-ex there. As tensions rise, someone wants to ensure Lindsey never leaves.

programme.title: He Loves Me
programme.desc: Desperate to save her idyllic life and marriage, Laura's mysterious past begins to emerge, and with it paranoid delusions that pose a serious threat to anyone who gets in her way.

programme.title: The Killing Game
programme.desc: Ten years after her daughter's murder, Eve is contacted by a man claiming to be the child's killer, who taunts her with mysterious clues and threats to kill again.

programme.title: A Nurse to Die For
programme.desc: A father hires a live in nurse to help care for his sick daughter. However, as she suffers a series of setbacks, he starts to wonder if the nurse might actually be the one keeping her sick.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: When best-selling mystery author Mallory Dearborn decides to end her long-running detective franchise, her unhinged manager takes her prisoner and forces her to write a new novel during the holidays.

programme.title: My Father's Murder in Greece
programme.desc: When Allie's father George takes her on a celebratory trip to Greece to discover her familial roots, George is murdered. Allie must uncover family secrets to bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: How to Live Your Best Death
programme.desc: Hoping to go after her dreams, Kristin hires Ashley, a life coach who promises to help her reach her full potential. However, things take a turn when unconventional methods start to wreak havoc,

programme.title: The Boarding School Murders
programme.desc: Foster teen Frankie attends an elite Swiss boarding school. One of her classmates is murdered and everyone is quick to blame Frankie. She must prove innocence before becoming a prime suspect.

programme.title: Film Stars Don't Die in Liverpool
programme.desc: A vibrant affair between a legendary femme fatale and her young lover quickly grows into a deep relationship. Their passion for life is tested by events beyond their control.

programme.title: The Professor and the Madman
programme.desc: James Murray begins compiling words for the first edition of the Oxford English Dictionary in the mid 19th century, receiving over 10,000 entries from an asylum patient.

programme.title: Hyde Park on Hudson
programme.desc: Global affairs are juggled with the all-too-human side of one of history's iconic leaders Franklin D. Roosevelt as he hosts the English royals for an unforgettable weekend in upstate NY.

programme.title: Belle
programme.desc: The mixed-race daughter, Dido Elizabeth Belle, of Royal Navy Captain Sir John Lindsay is raised by aristocratic Great-uncle Lord William Murray, 1st Earl of Mansfield in eighteenth century England.

programme.title: Farming
programme.desc: A young Nigerian boy is sent to be raised by a white British family in the hopes of a better future, and instead becomes the leader of a white skinhead gang.

programme.title: The Bookshop
programme.desc: Set in a small town in 1959 England, a woman decides, against polite but ruthless local opposition, to open a bookshop, a decision which becomes a political minefield.

programme.title: Madame Bovary
programme.desc: Trapped in a loveless marriage and eager for excitement, a doctor's wife seeks love and fulfilment outside the bonds of matrimony.

programme.title: Tommy's Honour
programme.desc: Tom and Tommy Morris, father and son pioneers of professional golf, rely on skill, business acumen, and working-class street smarts to make Tommy one of the world's first sports superstars.

programme.desc: Global affairs are juggled with the all-too-human side of one of history's iconic leaders Franklin D. Roosevelt as he hosts the English royals for an unforgettable weekend in upstate NY.

programme.title: Mary Shelley
programme.desc: The love affair between poet Percy Shelley and 18-year-old Mary Wollstonecraft Godwin, which resulted in Mary Shelley writing Frankenstein.

programme.desc: In 1962 England, a young couple find their idyllic romance colliding with issues of sexual freedom and societal pressure.

programme.desc: Bigpaw finds out Frank and Beans were lying to the town./ Sam Whippet sets up a pirate-themed race for the Race Cadets, pirate-loving Scooch takes on the role of captain.

programme.title: Dragons Rescue Riders: Heroes of the Sky
programme.desc: Elbone goes missing and the Rescue Riders find his boat near an island covered with unique crystals. But when they go inside a crystal cave looking for him, they realise these crystals have a unique effect.

programme.title: Boss Baby: Back in the Crib
programme.desc: Boss, Tina, JJ, Dez and Pip wilfully get babysit by the Uncuddleables, planning to expose them as horrible sitters via secret, hidden cameras.

programme.title: Abominable and the Invisible City
programme.desc: Yi realizes that Peng and Everest were taken by Nian, the legendary dragon-like creature associated with Chinese New Year, and he's also taken their other creature friends!

programme.title: The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants
programme.sub-title: Captain Underpants and the Bizarre Bout of the Beastly Barfilisk
programme.desc: Harold and George don't ask for much, just a fun scavenger hunt that doesn't include doing Krupp's errands. Careful what you wish for, fellas.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.sub-title: The Ocelot King vs. El Mariposa
programme.desc: Unable to decide how to prove their innocence, the team has a huge fight! Ms Nowhere and Echo Pearl reach out to Palindrome with the evidence they've while Tony and Cisco find Uncle Tuco.

programme.title: Jurassic World: Camp Cretaceous
programme.desc: With Dr Turner's help, the kids finally have a way off the island! It's everything they had hoped for until they discover a mysterious dinosaur trapped somewhere it's certainly not intended to be.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Dragon Knight
programme.desc: More epic action and intrigue as Po and the Dragon Knights continue their quest to destroy the Tianshang weapons, but find themselves in treacherous waters when they are captured by pirates.

programme.title: The Croods: Family Tree
programme.sub-title: What Goes Eep Must Come Dawn
programme.desc: After a crowverine gliding mishap, Dawn loses her confidence and tells Eep she's taking a break from adventures. Eep convinces Dawn to join her on one last adventure - climbing Grrr Mountain.

programme.title: Spirit Riding Free
programme.desc: When Lucky and the PALs arrive home from the circus, they find that Maricela and her new bicycle have become the star attraction in Miradero.

programme.title: Kipo and the Age of Wonderbeasts
programme.sub-title: Beyond the Valley of the Dogs
programme.desc: Kipo finally makes it to her new burrow where she reunites with her father, only to learn that bringing surface survivors Wolf, Dave, Benson and Mandu along is much more complicated than she thinks.

programme.title: Kung Fu Panda: The Paws of Destiny
programme.desc: The kids go to the Spirit Realm and meet the Original Four Constellations in the hopes of learning how to defeat Jindiao.

programme.desc: Hailing from Tamworth, Lane Pittman stormed through 2023 and is soaring into 2024 with a debut EP and shows, including a return to CMC Rocks QLD. Get ready for his performance with his clips.

programme.title: CMC Rocks 2025: Abbie Ferris
